queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'PyCharm %' AND name NOT LIKE 'PyCharm Community Edition%' AND publisher = 'JetBrains s.r.o.';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'PyCharm %' AND name NOT LIKE 'PyCharm Community Edition%' AND publisher = 'JetBrains s.r.o.' AND version_compare(version, '2024.3.5') < 0);
